sizing_rule.note: Equal allocation across 3+ portfolio elements (3.33% per element for 30% max portfolio exposure). Normalizes position size by daily ATR/range per instrument to achieve equal risk contribution regardless of notional size differences.

source_rule_text: A trader should allocate position size equally across all portfolio elements to ensure each trade receives equal opportunity to contribute to total returns, rather than allowing larger notional exposure in some positions to dominate portfolio outcomes.
